data.raceName: MJR WOOD & CRAFT ONSITE TODAY SPRINT PBD
data.raceComments: {"comment":"6. HOMEBUSH QUINN broke his maiden last start by 2 lengths at Ascot Park over 390m (23.01). Has two placings this course. Running out nominations in maiden grade and can go on with it. 3. TWENTY BLACK was safely held last time out, finishing fifth at Ascot Park over 457m behind Opawa Leo (26.85) in a Class 0. Was in the money the start prior. Worth following up. 5. DETECTIVE DEREK is by Dyna Villa out of Homebush Fanta making debut. Did run third in a five dog trial (17.32) on this track over 295m. Profiles well so pay to keep very safe.","runners":[6,3,5],"exclusive":false}
